task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'E-Commerce Platform' project in OpenProject.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'Implement product recommendation engine' work package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The details view or edit modal for the work package titled 'Implement product recommendation engine' is open on the screen.
The 'Start date' field in the work package details shows '2025-09-01' (or equivalent date format like 09/01/2025 depending on locale).
The 'Finish date' or 'Due date' field in the work package details shows '2025-10-15' (or equivalent date format).

task_completion.description: Update the estimated time to 40 hours.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Estimated time' field in the work package details shows '40' or '40.0' hours.
The '% Complete' or 'Done ratio' field in the work package details shows '25%'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface rather than using API calls or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open navigating to localhost:8080, showing the actual OpenProject GUI.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the fields within the OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are visible in the OpenProject work package form, potentially accompanied by success toast notifications (e.g., 'Successful update'), rather than just being typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to change the work package.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands, psql, or sqlite3 modifying the OpenProject database directly.
